name: my-harness
description: Personal project-delivery harness skills for coordinating gstack, Superpowers, Pencil, browser checks, Git, release closeout, and cross-platform plugin updates.

interface.longDescription: My Harness groups personal workflow skills for deciding the next project action, creating design governance, updating the harness plugin, and extending a gstack + Superpowers + Pencil + Playwright + Git delivery loop.
defaultPrompt: 我现在项目推进到哪一步了，下一步该做什么？
为这个项目初始化设计规范和 Pencil 原型目录
检查 my-harness 是否有新版本，并说明当前版本到目标版本的迭代
